lines: The wheel is locked at both ends of its travel. Iron filings lie below a housing opened and closed dozens of times.

effects.log: The wheel was sound. Automatic closure withdrew the local release tooth and waited for clearance from outside.

choices.label: Read the wear left by the trapped hands

effects.log: The wheel turned freely until something inside the wall withdrew its drive tooth. Later blows struck the same housing.

lines: The people below did not fail to find the release. The release was designed to refuse them.
A bent brace beside the housing preserves the angle used during the last breach attempt.
